ipfs.description: manage IPFS distribution of eggs ISOs via brig

isos.description: erase all ISOs on remote mount

krill.description: a TUI system installer - install the system

random.description: Add random to hostname, eg: colibri-ay412dt
random.name: random

action.description: action: track, list, setup, enable, disable
action.name: action

lfs.description: manage git-lfs tracking for produced ISOs

love.description: the simplest way to get an egg!

dtbdir.description: path to Device Tree Blobs (DTB) directory
dtbdir.name: dtbdir

mom.description: ask help from mommy - TUI helper

produce.description: produce a live image from your system
examples: sudo eggs produce                    # zstd fast compression
sudo eggs produce --pendrive         # zstd compression optimized pendrive
sudo eggs produce --homecrypt      # clone crypted home (all inside /home is cypted)
sudo eggs produce --fullcrypt      # clone crypted full (entire system is crypted)

addons.description: addons to be used: adapt, pve, rsupport
addons.name: addons

dtbdir.description: path to Device Tree Blobs (DTB) directory
dtbdir.name: dtbdir

lfs.description: track produced ISO in git-lfs after build
lfs.name: lfs

ipfs.description: publish produced ISO to IPFS via brig after build
ipfs.name: ipfs

snapshot.description: create BTRFS snapshots before/after build (requires BTRFS)
snapshot.name: snapshot

release.description: release: remove penguins-eggs, calamares and dependencies after installation
release.name: release

script.description: script mode. Generate scripts to manage iso build
script.name: script

theme.description: theme for livecd, calamares branding and partitions
theme.name: theme

st.description: produce System Transparency compatible boot artifacts from eggs ISOs

export:appimage.description: export penguins-eggs AppImage to the destination host

export:iso.description: export remastered ISO in the destination host

clean.description: delete old ISOs before to copy
clean.name: clean

export:pkg.description: export penguins-eggs package to the destination host

export:tarballs.description: export pkg/iso/tarballs to the destination host

setup:install.description: Automatically check and install system prerequisites
examples: sudo eggs setup install              # install native dependencies, autocomplete, man, etc
sudo eggs setup purge                # purge all configurations, autocomplete, man, etc installed from penguins-eggs AppImage

setup:purge.description: Automatically check and install system prerequisites
examples: sudo eggs setup install              # install native dependencies, autocomplete, man, etc
sudo eggs setup purge                # purge all configurations, autocomplete, man, etc installed from penguins-eggs AppImage

tools:yolk.description: configure eggs to install without internet

wardrobe:browse.description: browse wardrobe repo revisions via read-only FUSE mount

backend.description: gitfs backend: dsxack, jmillikin, jgitfs, auto
backend.name: backend

wardrobe:get-dir.description: download a specific wardrobe directory without cloning the full repo

sparse.description: use git sparse-checkout (faster for large dirs)
sparse.name: sparse

wardrobe:list.description: list costumes and accessoires in wardrobe

wardrobe:merge.description: merge multiple wardrobe repos into one, preserving history

wardrobe:mount.description: mount a wardrobe repo with auto-commit via gitfs

path.description: costume dir (share), gist URL (import), or search query (search)
path.name: path

wardrobe:share.description: share or import wardrobe costumes via Opengist
